title: Question: How to set `defines on per-module basis
body:
---


Author Name: **Jonathon Donaldson**
Original Redmine Message: 1514 from https://www.veripool.org



---

In modelsim I can use "+define+" with the vlog command to set a particular `define macro on a per-module basis. How can I do the same thing with verilator? Sometimes the design doesn't want a macro set globally for all verilog files and instead just wants it set for one module.

```
vlog +define+MY_MACRO module1.sv
vlog +define+MY_OTHER_MACRO module2.sv

```
